$comment: Hand-maintained Figma↔code mapping for the moment-card library. Equivalent to Code Connect, which requires Org/Enterprise — this file is the Pro-tier substitute. Update when a card kind gets a Figma component or a TS implementation. Sourced and rendered by `src/server/services/personalization/moment-render-v2.ts`.

mappings.archetype: Emphatic, dramatic — oversized type as imagery, destructive red against dark surface, broken horizontal rule motif.
Kinetic, ascending — giant level numeral as hero, xp-gold/amber palette, emerald chevron-stack motif suggesting growth.
Retrospective, trophied — poster format with longer body text, xp-gold + emerald palette, metallic divider with star glyph.

designSystemBindings.color/xp-gold: TOKENS.xpGold (season hero + kicker pill + metallic divider)
designSystemBindings.color/success: TOKENS.success (top-scorer stat accent + streak pulse + pip)

textStyles: (inline 52px Bold for season hero, 18px Medium for squad subtitle)

dataShape.label: Season name (e.g. 'Spring \'26')
dataShape.detail: Multi-line: squad name on first line, stats summary on subsequent lines (2nd stat line is rendered with --success accent)

fallback.note: Applies to any moment kind without a dedicated archetype entry above. Keeps the design system (Space Grotesk + dark surface + token-based tier color) but mirrors the v1 template composition. Replace with per-kind archetypes as they're added.
